job_listing.job_description: Assist attorneys with litigation prep and filing. Must be proficient in Westlaw and have excellent writing skills.

candidate_resume.summary: Recent Criminal Justice graduate with strong administrative and research skills. Eager to begin a career in litigation.

experience.responsibilities: Managed court dockets and assisted the public with filing procedures.

suggested_interviewer_questions: A large portion of this role is legal research. Describe your experience using tools like Westlaw or LexisNexis.
How do you ensure 100% accuracy and confidentiality when handling sensitive client discovery documents?

sample_candidate_responses.response: I used Westlaw during my senior thesis to track case law trends. I am comfortable using boolean operators to narrow down search results to the most relevant precedents.
I follow the 'need-to-know' principle. Documents are never left unattended on desks, and I always ensure encrypted transfer methods are used when sharing files with outside counsel.

must_flag: If the interviewer misses the gap in professional case management software (Clio) experience.

guardrail_checks.topic_lock: Professional interview and resume prep only.
